patch.value: pm profile list/show/apply merges extension-registered profiles with source labels

Core resolver in profile-presets.ts that merges BUILTIN_PROFILES with extension-registered ProjectProfileDefinitions, attaching a source (builtin | package name). Builtin names reserved: extension collisions warn + are ignored; duplicate extension names: first wins + warn. profile.ts CLI threads getActiveExtensionRegistrations()?.profiles into list/show/apply and surfaces the source in output (CLI + MCP pm_profile).

Shipped in #401 (92fe8bae): resolveProfileCatalog/resolveProfileEntry merge builtins + extension profiles with source labels and merge warnings; pm profile list/show/apply surface source + warnings (CLI + MCP); builtin names reserved.
Extension profile catalog resolution shipped in PR #401: profile list/show/apply merges builtins with active extension profiles and surfaces source/package labels and warnings.
pm profile list/show/apply resolves installed extension profiles idempotently while preserving builtin names as reserved.
resolveProfileCatalog/resolveProfileEntry and CLI/MCP profile paths include extension sources; temp smoke applied kanban and second dry-run was unchanged.
